chunks.en: I usually finish work at six in the evening.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夕方6時に仕事を終えます。

chunks.en: I usually check my email one last time.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい最後にもう一度メールを確認します。

chunks.en: Before I leave, I turn off my computer.
chunks.ja: 帰る前に、私はパソコンの電源を切ります。

chunks.en: Before I leave, I clean up my desk a little.
chunks.ja: 帰る前に、私は少しだけ机を片付けます。

chunks.en: When I go home, I say goodbye to my coworkers.
chunks.ja: 帰るとき、私は同僚にさよならと言います。

chunks.en: When I go home, I tell them to take care.
chunks.ja: 帰るとき、私は彼らに気をつけてねと言います。

chunks.en: After a long day, I feel tired but happy.
chunks.ja: 長い一日のあと、私は疲れているけれど幸せな気持ちです。

chunks.en: After a long day, I just want to relax at home.
chunks.ja: 長い一日のあと、私はただ家でくつろぎたいです。

outline: Opening: what time I finish work
Point 1: what I do before I leave
Point 2: what I say to coworkers
Wrap-up: how I feel after the day

modelTalk.text: I usually finish work around six o'clock. Sometimes I stay a little late. First, I save my files. Then I turn off my computer. I put my papers away. I clean my desk a bit. I grab my bag and my coat. I say goodbye to my coworkers. I tell them, "See you tomorrow!" They smile and wave at me. Then I walk out the door. After a long day, I'm tired. But I'm happy too. I've done my work. It's a good feeling. I like going home now. I can finally rest. That's the best part of my day.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about leaving work.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事を終えて帰ることについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually finish my work around six o'clock.
chunks.ja: 私はいつも六時ごろに仕事を終えます。

chunks.en: Before I leave, I turn off my computer.
chunks.ja: 帰る前に、私はパソコンの電源を切ります。

chunks.en: I also check my email one last time.
chunks.ja: 最後にもう一度メールも確認します。

chunks.en: When I go home, I say goodbye to my coworkers.
chunks.ja: 帰るとき、私は同僚にさようならと言います。

chunks.en: After a long day, I feel very tired.
chunks.ja: 長い一日のあと、私はとても疲れを感じます。

chunks.en: But I feel happy because my work is done.
chunks.ja: でも仕事が終わったので、私は幸せな気持ちです。

outline: Point 1: finish time and turning off computer
Wrap-up: how I feel after a long day

modelTalk.text: I usually finish work at six o'clock. Sometimes I stay a little longer. But most days I leave on time. Before I go, I turn off my computer. I put my papers in the drawer. I check my desk and clean it up. Then I take my bag and my coat. I say goodbye to my coworkers. I tell them, "See you tomorrow!" They smile and wave at me. After a long day, I'm really tired. My feet hurt and I want to rest. But I'm happy too. I did my work well today. Now it's time to go home and relax.
